# QA Plan: S81–S88 Scenario Editor Program (Headless Slice)

**Date**: 2026-07-05
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 8 sprints (S81–S88) implementing the headless slice of the Scenario Editor (req 11 / E11). Tracks and deliverables from the sprint plans (sprint-81-scenario-editor-foundations.md through sprint-88-scenario-editor-gate.md). 19 QA units / ACs (from qa-plan-scenario-editor-2026-07-01.md and s88 gate).
**Engine**: .NET 8 (headless) + Unity 6.3 LTS (6000.3.14f1) for AC-8 round-trip only. Primary work is in the CLI / Data / Validation layers.
**Sprint Files**: production/sprints/sprint-8{1-8}-*.md (plus parallel kickoffs and closeouts)
**Authority / Cites**: `production/scenario-editor-scope-boundary-2026-07-04.md` + `roadmap-execute-plan-07042026.md` §3/§4 + `future-sprint-roadpmap-07042026.md` + `production/qa/qa-plan-scenario-editor-2026-07-01.md` + `Game-Requirements/requirements/11-Agentic-Mission-Editor.md` + AGENTS.md + S81–S88 sprint plans/closeouts/gate.

> **Note on stories**: No traditional `production/epics/*/story-*.md` files were created for this program. Work was tracked via sprint plans with parallel tracks + the 19 QA units in the original qa-plan and S88 gate. This plan treats the 19 units (and the concrete tracks that implemented them) as the story equivalents.

---

| 2 | AC-2 Determinism (fire_order + hash) | S85 | Logic | Integration / CLI test (ScenarioSimulateSampleCliTests + determinism) | None |

| 7 | AC-7 Event debugger unmet-conditions | S84 | Logic | EventDebuggerTests + EventDebuggerTrace | None |
| 8 | AC-8 Unity host round-trip | S87 | Integration | PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests extension (AC8_) | Manual Editor load + screenshots (fallback) |

| 10 | AC-10 editVersion conflict-reject | S82/S83 | Integration | ScenarioEditVersionGuardTests + Mcp* | None |
| 11 | AC-11 TeleportUnit logged export | S84 | Logic | TeleportUnitExportTests + ApplyTeleport transform | None |
| 12 | AC-12 Save-vs-export gate | S82 | Logic | SaveVsExportGateTests | None |

| 15 | AME-2.6 Schema/fixture conformance | S82 | Config/Data | examples/*.scenario.json vs schema (CI lint) | None |

| 17 | Stub-scope pins (debugger/TCA/AI/Incompatible) | S85 | Config/Data | StubScopePinTests (4 pins) | None |

**Classification note**: Types taken from S88 gate table (authoritative). Most validation/calculation work is Logic. Cross-system command/round-trip work is Integration. Byte-stability, stubs, and schema checks are Config/Data. AC-8 is the only one with manual fallback.

---

## Automated Tests Required

### AC-1 Fuel-reachability — Logic (S81)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Validation/ReachabilityCalculatorTests.cs` (extend)
**What to test**:
- Exact reachability formula results for given unit/waypoint sets.
- Error messages on invalid inputs.

**Edge cases**:
- Zero-distance, unreachable due to terrain/fuel, max-range boundary.

**Estimated test count**: ~5–8

### AC-2 Determinism (fire_order + world-state hash) — Logic (S85)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/ScenarioSimulateSampleCliTests.cs` (extend) + determinism harness
**What to test**:
- Byte-identical `fire_order` array across two runs with same seed + knobs.
- Identical world-state hash (excluding `editorState`).
- `SEED=... HASH=...` stdout contract.
- Sim isolation under parallel CI.

**Edge cases**:
- Empty event list, all conditions unmet, different seed produces different hash.

**Estimated test count**: ~6

### AC-3a–f Validation rule codes — Logic (S82)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Validation/ValidationGoldenTests.cs` + `ScenarioValidationEngineTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- All 6 rule codes individually asserted in output and golden fixtures.

**Edge cases**:
- Multiple violations, warning vs error classification.

### AC-4 Doctrine inheritance — Integration (S82)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Validation/DoctrineInheritanceValidateTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- Resolved ROE / doctrine on missions with and without overrides using `doctrine-inheritance.json` fixture.

**Edge cases**:
- Side default vs mission override, conflicting child doctrine.

### AC-5 Strike+Patrol+Support+Ferry — Integration (S83)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/MissionAddFerryCommandTests.cs` + `ScenarioSimulateSampleCliTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- Ferry command creation / update round-trips.
- Full Strike+Patrol+Support+Ferry sample fixture simulates cleanly.

**Edge cases**:
- Mixed mission types in one scenario.

### AC-6 Byte-stable save / one-hunk diff — Config/Data (S85)
**Test file path**: `tools/ci/smoke-ac6.sh`
**What to test**:
- Identical saves produce byte-identical JSON.
- Single-field edit produces exactly one focused hunk with stable key order.

**Edge cases**:
- Adding a mission (clean insertion), nested object change.

### AC-7 Event debugger unmet-conditions — Logic (S84)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Scenario/EventDebuggerTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- `EventDebuggerTrace` projects unmet conditions with `fired:false`, `last_evaluated_tick`, `unmet_conditions[]`.

**Edge cases**:
- Never-firing event, multiple unmet conditions.

### AC-8 Unity host round-trip — Integration (S87)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/Bridge/PlayModeSmokeHarnessTests.cs` (AC8_ test)
**What to test**:
- Headless-authored `.scenario.json` (e.g. baltic-patrol or strike-package) loads in PlayMode with intact ORBAT, missions, events.
- `editorState` populated with schema defaults (camera at centroid, layers on).

**Manual fallback**: `production/qa/evidence/s87-ac8-unity-roundtrip-evidence.md` (screenshots + checklist).

### AC-9 Schema lint (editorState derived-only) — Logic (S82)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Scenario/DerivedOnlyInvariantTests.cs` + SchemaConformanceTests
**What to test**:
- Only `editorState` is marked derived-only.
- Validation/sim never reads editorState for logic.

### AC-10 editVersion conflict-reject — Integration (S82/S83)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Scenario/ScenarioEditVersionGuardTests.cs` + Mcp tests
**What to test**:
- Stale editVersion on update/save produces conflict rejection.

### AC-11 TeleportUnit logged export — Logic (S84)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Scenario/TeleportUnitExportTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- TeleportUnit action is stripped at export with logged manifest entry.
- Post-transform set matches simulate sample.

### AC-12 Save-vs-export gate — Logic (S82)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Validation/SaveVsExportGateTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- Save succeeds while export is gated (or vice-versa per rule).

### AME-8.4 Ferry + AME-8.5 Undo — Integration (S83)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/MissionAddFerryCommandTests.cs`, `ScenarioUndoCliTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- Ferry verbs registered and functional.
- Undo round-trips (disk-backed sidecar persistence for cross-process).

**Note**: AME-8.5 persistence decision locked to disk-backed JSON sidecar.

### AME-2.6 Schema/fixture conformance — Config/Data (S82)
**Test file path**: CI lint or `ScenarioDocumentSchemaConformanceTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- All `data/scenarios/examples/*.scenario.json` conform to schema on build.

### ADR-016 event-graph hard cap (32) — Logic (S84)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Validation/EventGraphComplexityTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- 33rd condition on an event is hard blocking error.
- Complexity / tick-density warnings are non-blocking.

### Stub-scope pins — Config/Data (S85)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Scenario/StubScopePinTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- Pin exact current output shape for: event debugger, TCA static analysis, AI/NL scaffold, IncompatibleHost/BrokenRef.
- Future real implementation must update the pin + docs.

### NFR 5k ORBAT perf — Perf (waived, S88)
Opportunistic only. No dedicated automated harness required for gate.

### NFR no Lua / dynamic exec — Arch (S86)
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Architecture/NoDynamicExecutionGateTests.cs`
**What to test**:
- Grep / static gate: no `Lua`, Roslyn scripting, `eval`, or dynamic execution in editor/validation paths.

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### AC-8 Unity host round-trip — Integration (S87)
**Verification method**: PlayMode extension (primary) + manual Editor load-and-inspect fallback
**Who must sign off**: unity-ui-specialist / qa-tester / c-sharp-devops-engineer
**Evidence to capture**: Screenshots of loaded ORBAT/missions/events + editorState defaults; PlayMode test output.

Checklist:
- [ ] Headless-authored scenario loads without error in Unity host.
- [ ] ORBAT, missions, and events match the source file exactly.
- [ ] `editorState` present with correct defaults (camera at theater centroid, all layers enabled).
- [ ] No mutation of the canonical source file outside `editorState`.

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths before any QA hand-off for S81–S88:

1. Game launches to main menu without crash.
2. New headless scenario can be created/validated via CLI (`scenario_validate`).
3. `scenario_simulate_sample` runs with SEED/HASH contract and produces fire_order + world hash.
4. Save + export gate behaves correctly (AC-6 / AC-12).
5. Editor subset filter passes: `dotnet test ... --filter "ScenarioDocument|Validation|Editor|Ferry|Undo|EventDebugger|..."`.
6. Full baseline: build 0e/0w, tests ≥1232/0f (excl. known UA), Replay 6/6, C2 19/19, hash 18 files, smoke-ac6 PASS.
7. GitNexus preflight clean on ScenarioDocumentEditor / ScenarioValidationEngine + §5 CRITICALs.
8. Unity AC-8 round-trip (PlayMode or manual) succeeds for at least one headless-authored example.

Run via `/smoke-check` (or the Phase 0 script in the gate doc) before handing off.

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story / AC | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|------------|---------------|--------------|--------------------|
| AC-8 Unity round-trip | Confirm headless-authored scenario feels correct when loaded in the host (ORBAT/missions/events visible and usable in C2 views) | 1 | Experienced C2 / scenario author |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes in `production/session-logs/playtest-s87-ac8-*.md` (or evidence doc) reviewed by qa-lead / unity lead before S87/S88 complete.

All other units are logic/integration/config and do not require playtest for this headless slice.

---

## Definition of Done — S81–S88 Program

A unit / track is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (PlayMode output, screenshots, sign-off).
- [ ] Test file exists at the path listed above for Logic and Integration units.
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for AC-8 (and any waived NFR).
- [ ] Smoke check passes (full Phase 0 + editor subset + smoke-ac6).
- [ ] No regressions to baseline (Replay 6/6, C2 19/19, hash 18 files, ZERO DelegationBridge edits).
- [ ] GitNexus impacts / detects run before changes; low-risk or pre-approved.
- [ ] Code reviewed (peer or via review skill).
- [ ] Sprint closeout doc produced with RUN+READ evidence and cites.
- [ ] For S88: human ack phrase provided and recorded.

---

## Notes & Gaps Flagged

- No traditional story files — work tracked in sprint plans + 19-unit table. Recommend `/create-stories` against 11-Agentic-Mission-Editor.md for future increments.
- AC-11 was blocked until TeleportUnit action existed (resolved in S84).
- UA pre-existing failures waived (S86); not new regressions.
- NFR #18 (5k ORBAT) waived as opportunistic.
- All work stayed within headless scope (no Phase 2 / map placement).

**Next steps after this plan**:
- Share with team.
- Implement / extend tests at the listed paths during the sprints.
- Before S88 hand-off: run full smoke + Phase 0 gates.
- After human ack: proceed with gt submit per S88-PostAck-Commands.md.
